recommendations.title: Storm Warning
recommendations.overview: A couple becomes lost in a massive storm and seek refuge at a nearby farmhouse, only to be captured by deranged killers.

recommendations.title: Urban Legend
recommendations.overview: A college campus is plagued by a vicious serial killer murdering students in ways that correspond to various urban legends.

recommendations.title: Long Weekend
recommendations.overview: Peter and Carla, a couple whose marriage is faltering, decide to go on a camping weekend. When they become lost, the pair sets up camp on a remote beach that doesn't seem to be on any map. At first the trip is the romantic getaway they imagined – the

recommendations.title: Three Colors: Red
recommendations.overview: Part-time model Valentine unexpectedly befriends a retired judge after she runs over his dog. At first, the grumpy man shows no concern about the dog, and Valentine decides to keep it. But the two form a bond when she returns to his house and catches

recommendations.title: My Bloody Valentine
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after a Valentine's Day tragedy claimed the lives of five miners, Harry Warden returns for a vengeful massacre among teen sweethearts gearing up for another party.

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: International students at an elite Prague school are stalked and murdered by a masked killer while holding a party in an abandoned water park.

recommendations.title: Lady in White
recommendations.overview: Locked in a school closet during Halloween 1962, young Frank witnesses the ghost of a young girl and the man who murdered her years ago. Shortly afterward he finds himself stalked by the killer and is soon drawn to an old house where a mysterious Lad

recommendations.title: Scream
recommendations.overview: A year after the murder of her mother, a teenage girl is terrorized by a masked killer who targets her and her friends by using scary movies as part of a deadly game.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: An American family on holiday in Africa becomes lost in a game reserve and stalked by vicious killer lions.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A deaf woman is stalked by a psychotic killer in her secluded home.
